title: Smoky Canadian Pea Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with smoky sausage, juicy chicken, and Canadian peas. Perfect for a cold winter's day.
instructions: Heat a tablespoon of oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced carrots and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the diced potatoes, smoky sausage, and juicy chicken breast. Cook for 5 minutes.
Add the Canadian peas, stew, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
